channel.title: Genesis News
channel.description: Genesis News — Original blockchain intelligence from dbappsystems.com

item.title: Hedera HBAR Emerges as Enterprise Blockchain of Choice for Tokenized Assets
item.description: Hedera's hashgraph consensus is gaining serious traction among Fortune 500 enterprises building tokenized asset platforms. Unlike proof-of-work chains, Hedera offers deterministic finality in under 5 seconds at fractions of a cent per transaction — making it the only public ledger that actually scales for institutional volume.

item.title: NFT Minting Moves Beyond JPEG: Real-World Asset Tokenization Takes Center Stage
item.description: The NFT narrative has officially shifted from speculative art to provable ownership of real-world assets. Platforms building on Hedera and Ethereum are now minting tokenized real estate, IP rights, and media content — with legal enforceability finally catching up to the technology. The infrastructure wave is here.

item.title: SentX Marketplace Signals Maturity for Hedera NFT Ecosystem
item.description: SentX has quietly become the de facto NFT marketplace for the Hedera ecosystem, offering sub-cent minting fees and near-instant settlement. Builders targeting HBAR-native NFT platforms now have a proven distribution layer — reducing time-to-market for new minting applications significantly.
